articles.title: Missed EMI on a digital loan? Here's what borrowers need to know
articles.description: For many people, digital lending apps offer a quick solution during emergencies. But for some borrowers, the problems begin when they are unable to repay on time.

articles.title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ review: Beauty with brains under Rs 50,000
articles.description: The Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ gets plenty right, from its premium design and fluid performance to its capable cameras and clean software. But, it is not without flaws. This leads us to ponder on: is it worth your money?

articles.title: MacBook Air M5 available at the old price on Croma despite the massive price hike: Here's how to get the deal
articles.description: Croma is offering the MacBook Air M5 at its pre-price-hike rate, with additional bank discounts and Tata Neu benefits, allowing buyers to reduce the effective purchase price further.

articles.title: Mangalore man rides to Delhi on electric scooter: 'Detachable battery made 12,500 km travel easy'
articles.description: 'From dhaba owners to villagers, people wanted to understand how an EV could travel across the country,' Girish Shet said, adding that many refused to accept money for allowing him to charge the scooter.

articles.title: KTM 160 Duke vs 200 Duke: Which One Should You Buy
articles.description: The KTM 160 Duke has made it easier for young riders in India to own a KTM, with an affordable entry price below the 200 Duke. Here's a quick comparison between the two KTMs to help you pick the one that suits your budget and riding style.

articles.title: Two-wheelers, PVs to drive auto sector's double-digit growth in June
articles.description: India's auto sector expects sustained demand in June 2026, with two-wheelers and passenger vehicles projected to achieve double-digit YoY retail growth. This is despite cautious rural demand, price hikes, and a slight MoM dip for two-wheelers.

articles.title: Delhi plans AI-powered fire response, drones and 196 fire stations under 25-year roadmap
articles.description: Delhi Fire Services has proposed a 25-year modernisation plan featuring AI, drones and smart fire alerts to cut emergency response times and strengthen the Capital's firefighting network

articles.title: Apple iPhone 18 launch date leaked again: Here's when the new iPhones are expected to arrive
articles.description: Apple's iPhone 18 series could launch in September 2026, with leaks pointing to four models, possible price hikes, and the debut of a foldable iPhone.

articles.title: Opinion: Opinion | 330 Million: Why The Biggest Number In India's AI Boom Is The Most Useless One
articles.description: India has the largest crowd of AI users. But that number could be a vanity, pleasant to report in the morning and slow to pay by evening. Because who wants to pay for AI yet?

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki Invicto Prices Increased By Up To Rs 25,000 In June 2026
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki has revised the price for the Invicto MPV in India. The MPV's Zeta Plus 8-seater variant now costs Rs 25.27 lakh, which is an increase of Rs 25,000. Prices of other trims remain the same.

articles.title: New Nissan Tekton Rear Spied - Creta, Duster Rival Coming on July 9
articles.description: Nissan Tekton, the brand's new SUV, has been seen in testing with its rear design largely exposed, just days before its debut on July 9. This model is crucial for Nissan's strategy in India and will target competitors like the Creta and Seltos.

articles.title: Bengaluru Techie's Rs 71,000 Monthly Spending, Including Weekend Trips, Goes Viral, Internet Reacts: ‘I’m Poor’
articles.description: A Bengaluru tech professional's viral Reddit post detailed a Rs 71,000 monthly budget, with Rs 20,000 allocated to weekend trips, sparking a social media debate. Users debated whether this reflected a comfortable lifestyle or lifestyle inflation. While some found the spending excessive, others defended it as a personal choice based on priorities.

articles.title: Alstom secures 5-year maintenance service agreement at the Nagpur depot for WAG-12B electric locomotives through its joint venture with Indian Railways (MELPL)
articles.description: Alstom, a global leader in smart and sustainable mobility, today announced that its joint venture with Indian Railways, Madhepura Electric Locomotive Private Limited (MELPL), has been awarded a new five-year maintenance services contract. Valued at €107 million, the agreement covers the comprehensive maintenance of 250 WAG-12B electric locomotives at the MELPL Nagpur Depot. This contract [...] The post Alstom secures 5-year maintenance service agreement at the Nagpur depot for WAG-12B electric locomotives through its joint venture with Indian Railways (MELPL) appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: End of destroyers era? UK scraps next-generation destroyers plan for a Common combat vessels
articles.description: In a pivotal change, the UK has scrapped its Type 83 destroyer program in favor of developing a fleet of at least six 'Common Combat Vessels' (CCVs) tailored for drone integration. Scheduled to be operational by the early 2030s, these ships will play a crucial role in modern warfare by coordinating drone systems, supporting the Royal Navy, and navigating current financial and operational challenges.

articles.title: FBI reportedly turned to AI after the White House Correspondents' Dinner attack, here's how it works
articles.description: AI-powered forensic software played a role in the FBI's investigation into the 2026 White House Correspondents' Dinner attempted assassination. Exterro's FTK Suite, used to sift through vast digital evidence like seized devices and social media, highlights AI's growing importance in law enforcement. The platform's AI assistant allows investigators to quickly find specific information, accelerating evidence review and aiding in cases involving complex digital footprints.

articles.title: Mark Zuckerberg’s Meta will soon use AI to do what thousands of human moderators do
articles.description: Meta is reportedly replacing thousands of human content moderators with advanced AI, aiming to cut costs and improve accuracy. The tech giant is fast-tracking the deployment of large language models to review posts on Facebook and Instagram, potentially saving billions. While Meta claims AI outperforms humans, some employees express concerns about its struggle with nuance and potential for errors like mistaken deletions and 'shadow-banning'.

articles.title: This IndiGo aircraft used Gagan satellite system instead of ground radio to land; Here's how it did it
articles.description: An IndiGo Airbus A320 made history by successfully landing in Udaipur using Gagan, India's indigenous satellite-based navigation system, marking a first for Indian aviation

articles.title: India's AI ambitions hinge on overcoming regional language divide
articles.description: India has over 2 dozen official languages and more than 100 dialects and if AI can't close this gap, it will just become another technology that divides the English-speaking elite and everyone else

articles.title: 92% of tech execs see AI agent management as a key future skill: KPMG
articles.description: A new KPMG report shows 92% of tech executives believe managing AI agents will be a vital skill. This rise of agentic AI is compelling companies to restructure their workforce, with digital assistants set to form a larger part of tech teams.

articles.description: The AP EAMCET 2026 result is expected to be announced shortly, ending the wait for engineering, agriculture and pharmacy aspirants across Andhra Pradesh. Candidates will be able to download their rank cards online before the counselling process begins, which will include registration, document verification, choice filling and seat allotment for undergraduate admissions.

articles.title: Weekly poll: would you buy the Oppo Reno16? What about the Oppo Reno16 Pro?
articles.description: Oppo unveiled the Reno16 series this week – this includes the vanilla and Pro models as well as the Reno16 F and FS versions. Let’s focus on the first pair – do you like what the Reno16 and Reno16 Pro have to offer? And have you seen how much they cost? Oppo Reno 16 and Reno 16 Pro We will need to re-calibrate our idea of how much a mid-range phone costs. The Oppo Reno16 starts at €900 for an 8/512GB phone, though you can get a €100 discount if you order before the end of July. The phone is powered by a Snapdragon 7 Gen 4 and a 6,700mAh battery with 80W fast charging (55W if...

articles.title: Sunday Reboot: Apple's gameshow phobia won't change anytime soon
articles.description: In this week's "Sunday Reboot," Malcolm ponders why Apple TV doesn't do game shows, and if it ever will properly work competition-based shows into its streaming service. Planet of the Apps, Apple's first attempt to make a proper game show. Image Credit: Apple Anyone paying a subscription expects to get their money's worth from their monthly outlay, especially when it comes to streaming services. I occasionally look at the collection that I pay for each month, and if I haven't watched it enough in the last few months, it gets cancelled for a while. This does help save a bit of money, but the one that I simply cannot do this to is Apple TV. That's primarily because it's in my Apple One subscription and I use everything else in the package a lot. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57 are available at a discounted price in the UK
articles.description: The Samsung Galaxy A37 and Galaxy A57, which were unveiled in March and went on sale in the UK in April, are now available at a discounted price on Samsung's official UK website until July 14. The Galaxy A37 was launched in the UK with 6GB/128GB and 8GB/256GB memory configurations priced at £399 and £459, respectively. The Galaxy A57, on the other hand, launched with 8GB/256GB and 12GB/512GB options, priced at £529 and £699, respectively. articles.title: UltraProlink launches Boost 45 MP, 45W GaN travel charger
articles.description: UltraProlink has unveiled the Boost 45 MP, a compact 45W GaN III travel charger designed for modern professionals. Featuring dual USB-C ports and broad multi-protocol support, it efficiently charges smartphones, tablets, laptops, and more from various brands with a single device. Priced at ₹1,599, this BIS-certified charger includes a 1-meter USB-C cable and offers robust protection for global travel.

articles.title: Italy launches probe into Microsoft over automatic upgrade to costlier AI subscriptions
articles.description: Italy's antitrust watchdog has launched an investigation into Microsoft over its recent price hikes for the Microsoft 365 subscription service. The authority alleges the tech giant failed to clearly inform consumers about the inclusion of new AI features like Copilot and Designer, automatically upgrading users to more expensive plans. This move, criticized for insufficient consumer information and potentially restricting choice, is being examined for aggressive commercial practices.

articles.title: Brazilian football scouts turn to AI apps to find the next generation of talent
articles.description: AI-powered scouting platforms are transforming football talent recruitment while raising concerns over bias and accessibility.

articles.title: China's New AI Cybersecurity Tool On Par With Anthropic's Mythos

articles.title: EU stands firm on digital tax, tells US President Donald Trump: ‘We have the ...’
articles.description: The European Union has firmly rejected US President Donald Trump's threats regarding digital services taxes. Brussels asserts its sovereign right to tax economic activity within its borders, stating these taxes apply equally to all large companies, irrespective of origin. Despite Trump's vow of retaliatory tariffs, the EU remains committed to its policies while seeking a global resolution.
